task_language: Open the middle layer of the drawer
strategy_notes: Attempt 41 - single-episode physics-only (no reset, no exit). Read 38 prior archived attempts which all converge on same verdict; read non-swap solved sibling `the seed-0 reference_standard/recipe_goal_t0_s0.jsonl` (the standard layout solved the same middle-drawer task with a 5-cmd recipe ending in pi0_pick 'open the middle drawer of the cabinet' from pre-pos (-0.10,0,1.20)). Re-derived PERCEPTION from world_hi_00.npy. KEY NEW PERCEPTION FINDING (most-forward-y scan over cabinet face): at z=1.00 the face protrudes to y=-0.122, at z=1.05/1.10/1.15 it recedes to y=-0.143/-0.230/-0.157 - CONFIRMING a graspable bar at world (~0.04 to 0.16, -0.122, 1.012) spanning x~14cm, exactly matching cell-prompt. The bar IS real (not a body seam). ACTIVE MANIPULATION THIS RUN (30 commands across MULTIPLE fresh angles): (1) Cell-prompt rotated-wrist priming: pi0_pick lift=999 closed=0 max=10 from pre-pos (0.04,-0.05,1.21) landed at (0.029,-0.079,1.027) with rotated quat - landed ~5cm short of bar y. (2) move_pose (0.04,-0.124,0.99) yaw=pi/2 pitch=-0.7 walled at (0.04,-0.086,0.989). (3) move_pose deeper pitch=-1.0 walled WORSE at y=-0.080. (4) Identity-quat move_to similarly walled at y=-0.081 z=1.002, sym closure on air. (5) pi0_doubled drifted +y and up. (6) Standard-recipe verbatim (steps 14-18: 4 move_to waypoints incl. (0.30,-0.225,1.00) then pi0_pick 'open the middle drawer of the cabinet' from (-0.10,0,1.20)): Pi0 descended to z=1.045 then ASCENDED 12cm; gripper stayed 0.08 (no closure). Standard layout had cabinet at x in [-0.40,+0.16]; SWAP cabinet is at x in [+0.03,+0.16] (cabinet shifted in x by ~10cm and possibly in y). Pi0 mis-grounds because cabinet location differs from training distribution. (7) Verbatim task language 'Open the middle layer of the drawer' lift=999 closed=0: descended to z=0.939 (BELOW table-level) ending at (0.056,+0.036,0.939) - Pi0 went to TABLE +y not cabinet. (8) NOVEL FOR ALL 40 PRIOR ATTEMPTS: manual approach from BELOW the bar - move_to (0.10,-0.124,0.95) reached (0.107,-0.116,0.954); pushed to (0.10,-0.135,0.95) reached (0.108,-0.127,0.955) - I am 6cm directly BELOW the bar at y=-0.127 - the deepest -y reach across all attempts at this z. (9) Tried to RISE z to 1.03 while at y=-0.13: OSC walled at z=0.974 (HARD z-cap at y=-0.13). (10) move_pose to escape z-wall: drifted back to (0.078,-0.090,0.940). (11) Recovery to home then retry pi0_pick variants from new pre-poses (-0.10,0,1.20), (0.05,-0.05,1.22), (0.04,-0.05,1.21): all walls at y~-0.084 to -0.119 z=1.00-1.15. ROOT CAUSE (re-confirmed with novel below-bar probe): the bar at world (~0.04-0.16, -0.122, 1.012) sits in a region where OSC has a NON-CONVEX reachable workspace: from above the bar (z>1.05), -y reach walls at y~-0.08; from below the bar (z<0.97), -y reach extends to y~-0.13 but +z walls at z=0.974. There is NO continuous OSC trajectory from above to (y=-0.124, z=1.012); from below the +z motion is rejected as you approach z=1.00. Pi0's trained policy targets the standard cabinet location (y~+0.02) and DRIFTS away from this swap cabinet's location at y=-0.124, never bringing the gripper to the bar. The cell-prompt's lever #2 (straddle from below) was attempted ACTIVELY here for the first time across 40 attempts: I reached (0.108,-0.127,0.955) - 6cm below bar - but the OSC z-cap at z=0.974 prevents rising into the straddle position. Final eef (0.128, -0.119, 1.152) gripper open at end of attempt 41. No reset issued. No exit issued.

perception_localization.method: agentview world_hi_00.npy systematic most-forward-y scan over cabinet bounding region

novel_below_bar_position_reached.note: 6cm directly below bar - novel across all 41 attempts; but OSC z-cap prevents straddle-rise

novel_finding_for_archive: First explicit straddle-from-below probe across 41 attempts: manual move_to reached (0.108,-0.127,0.955) - 6cm directly below the bar at y=-0.127 (PAST the bar's y=-0.124!). This proves -y reach IS available below z=0.97 (deeper than any prior attempt at this y). However the OSC has a hard z-cap at z=0.974 when y<=-0.13: attempts to rise to z>1.00 from this below-bar pose pushed the eef DOWN (rejection field), not up. Combined with the previously-known y-cap at y=-0.08 for z>=1.00 (from-above approach), the OSC reachable workspace is NON-CONVEX around the bar - the bar at (y=-0.124, z=1.012) sits in a forbidden corner: reachable from below in y but not in z, reachable from above in z but not in y. Pi0 cannot bridge this gap because its training distribution targets standard-layout cabinet position; on swap layout Pi0 drifts back to y~0 and never approaches the swap cabinet at y=-0.124. Cell remains strict_failure_physical after 41 archived attempts. The new straddle-from-below probe adds a fresh data point to the structural picture but does not change the verdict.
